title: TikTok-style full-screen video feed (one card per screen)

requirements.text: Redesign the main feed (HomePage) so each video post card occupies exactly one full screen height (100dvh or 100vh). The feed should be a vertically scrollable container with scroll-snap enabled (snap-type: y mandatory), so swiping/scrolling always lands on exactly one card at a time — no partial cards visible. The header should either overlay the feed or be excluded from the card height calculation so the card video+content fills the remaining viewport below it.
acceptanceCriteria: Each video card in the main feed takes up the full visible screen height below the header.
Scrolling snaps so exactly one card is visible at a time — no partial card is visible.
The video player and card content (avatar, title, actions) all fit within the single card without overflowing or being cut off.
The header remains accessible and does not push card content out of view.
Works correctly on mobile viewport sizes (as shown in the uploaded screenshot).

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Changing the video detail page or reply feed layout.
Auto-playing videos on scroll (unless already implemented).
